prompt_en: Which English midfielder moved to Real Madrid in summer 2023 and scored 19 La Liga goals in his debut season?

prompt_om: Gana bara 2023 A.L.A. keessatti gara Riyaal Maadiriiditti jijjiiramuudhaan waggaa dorgommii isaa isa jalqabaa keessatti galchii 19 kan galche taphattaa Ingilaand eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Brazilian winger scored the title-winning goal for Real Madrid vs Villarreal in July 2020 / key player in 2022 and 2024 titles?

prompt_en: Which Spanish midfielder won the Golden Boy award in 2021 while starring for FC Barcelona?

prompt_en: Which Polish striker won the Pichichi Trophy in his debut 2022-23 La Liga season with FC Barcelona (23 goals)?

prompt_en: Which Ukrainian striker finished as top scorer of La Liga in the 2023-24 season with 24 goals for Girona FC?

prompt_en: Which manager led Real Sociedad to victory in the delayed 2019-20 Copa del Rey final against Athletic Bilbao?

prompt_en: Which Spanish manager led Valencia CF to La Liga titles in 2001-02 and 2003-04 before moving to Liverpool?

prompt_en: Which Dutch manager won back-to-back La Liga titles with Real Madrid in 1987-88 and 1988-89?
prompt_am: በ1987-88 እና 1988-89 እ.ኤ.አ ከሪያል ማድሪድ ጋር ተከታታይ የላ ሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያነሳው ኔዘርላንድሳዊ አሰልጣኝ ማን ነው?

prompt_en: Which English manager won La Liga with FC Barcelona in the 1984-85 season, nicknamed 'El Tel'?

prompt_om: Maqaa masoo 'El Tel' jedhamuun kan beekamu fi bara dorgommii 1984-85 A.L.A. keessatti FC Baarseloonaa gara waancaa Laa Liigaatti kan leenjise leenjisaa Ingilaand eenyu?

prompt_en: Which famous sporting director built Sevilla FC's side that won numerous European and domestic trophies in the 2000s and 2010s?
prompt_am: በ2000ዎቹ እና 2010ዎቹ ሲቪያን ለብዙ የክህጉር እና ሀገር ውስጥ ዋንጫዎች ያበቃው ታዋቂው የቪያሪያል/ሲቪያ ስፖርት ዳይሬክተር ማን ነው?

prompt_en: What is the traditional name for the rivalry match between Athletic Bilbao and Real Sociedad?
prompt_am: በአትሌቲክ ቢልባኦ እና ሪያል ሶሴዳድ መካከል የሚደረገው ታሪካዊ ጨዋታ በባስክ ቋንቋ ምን ይባላል?

prompt_en: Which goalkeeper holds the all-time record for most penalty saves in La Liga history (22 penalties saved)?
prompt_am: በላ ሊጋ ታሪክ 22 ፔናልቲዎችን በማዳን ከፍተኛውን ሪከርድ የያዘው ብራዚላዊ ግብ ጠባቂ ማን ነው?

prompt_en: Which team recorded a 43-game unbeaten streak in La Liga from April 2017 to May 2018?

prompt_en: Which technology was introduced to La Liga starting in the 2018-19 season to assist referees?
prompt_am: ከ2018-19 እ.ኤ.አ የውድድር ዓመት ጀምሮ ዳኞችን ለማገዝ በላ ሊጋ ሥራ ላይ የዋለው ቴክኖሎጂ የትኛው ነው?
prompt_om: Waggaa dorgommii 2018-19 A.L.A. irraa jalqabee abbootii seeraa gargaaruuf Laa Liigaa keessatti teeknoolojiin hojiirra oole kam?

prompt_en: In what year was the Spanish Super Cup (Supercopa de España) expanded to a 4-team tournament format held in Saudi Arabia?
prompt_am: የስፔን ሱፐር ካፕ ወደ 4 ቡድኖች አድጎ በሳዑዲ አረቢያ መካሄድ የጀመረው በየትኛው የውድድር ዓመት ነው?

prompt_en: How many total teams compete in the top division of La Liga each season?
prompt_am: በየውድድር ዓመቱ በስፔን ፕሪሜራ ዲቪዚዮን (ላ ሊጋ) ውስጥ ስንት ክለቦች ይወዳደራሉ?

prompt_en: How many teams are relegated from La Liga to Segunda División at the end of each season?

prompt_en: Who scored the winning goal for Real Madrid against Barcelona at Camp Nou in April 2012 to virtually seal the title?
prompt_am: በኤፕሪል 2012 እ.ኤ.አ በካምፕ ኑ በባርሴሎና ላይ ለሪያል ማድሪድ የሻምፒዮንነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው ማን ነው?

prompt_en: Who scored the opening goal for Real Madrid in that 2-1 win over Barcelona at Camp Nou in April 2012?
prompt_am: በኤፕሪል 2012 እ.ኤ.አ በካምፕ ኑ ሪያል ማድሪድ ባርሴሎናን 2 ለ 1 ሲያሸንፍ የመክፈቻዋን ጎል ያስቆጠረው ጀርመናዊ አማካይ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Eebla bara 2012 A.L.A. keessatti Kaamp Nuutti Riyaal Maadiriid Baarseloonaa 2-1 yeroo mo'atu galchii bane kan galche taphattaa gidduu Jarman eenyu?

prompt_en: Who scored the equalizer for Barcelona against Real Madrid before Ronaldo's 'Calma' goal in April 2012?

prompt_om: Eebla bara 2012 A.L.A. keessatti tapha Riyaal Maadiriid irratti galchii Ronaaldoo dura Baarseloonaaf galchii qixxeessituu kan galche taphattaa fuula duraa Chiilii eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Spanish midfielder scored 11 goals in the 2013-14 season to help Atlético Madrid win La Liga?
prompt_am: በ2013-14 እ.ኤ.አ የውድድር ዓመት አትሌቲኮ ማድሪድ ሻምፒዮን ሲሆን 11 ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ስፔናዊ አማካይ ማን ነው?

prompt_en: Which Turkish playmaker wore number 10 and scored crucial goals for Atlético Madrid during their 2013-14 title run?

prompt_en: Who scored the winning goal for Atletico Madrid against Real Madrid in the 2013 Copa del Rey final at the Bernabéu (2-1)?
prompt_am: በ2013 እ.ኤ.አ የኮፓ ዴል ሬይ ፍፃሜ በበርናቤው በሪያል ማድሪድ ላይ ለአትሌቲኮ በራስ ግጭት የአሸናፊነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው ብራዚላዊ ተከላካይ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Xumura Koopaa del Reey bara 2013 A.L.A. Bernaabe'uutti Riyaal Maadiriid irratti Atleetikoof galchii injifannoo mataan kan galche eegduu sarara duubaa Biraazil eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Belgian goalkeeper won the Zamora Trophy twice with Atlético Madrid (2012-13, 2013-14) and once with Real Madrid (2019-20)?

prompt_om: Atleetikoo Maadiriid waliin si'a lama, Riyaal Maadiriid waliin si'a tokko waancaa Zaamooraa kan injifate eegduu qalloo Beeljiyam eenyu?

prompt_en: How many Zamora Trophies has Slovenian goalkeeper Jan Oblak won with Atlético Madrid?

prompt_om: Eegduun qalloo Silooveeniyaa Jaan Obilaak Atleetikoo Maadiriid waliin waancaa Zaamooraa meeqaa injifate?

prompt_en: Who scored four goals for Villarreal against Real Madrid in a thrilling 4-4 draw in May 2024?

prompt_om: Caamsaa bara 2024 A.L.A. keessatti Viyaariyaal Riyaal Maadiriid waliin 4-4 yeroo gargar ba'u galchii afuranuu Viyaariyaaliif kan galche taphattaa Noorweey eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Spanish manager led Girona FC to a historic Champions League qualification spot in the 2023-24 season?
prompt_am: በ2023-24 (በ2016 ዓ.ም) የውድድር ዓመት ጂሮናን ለታሪካዊው የቻምፒዮንስ ሊግ ቦታ የመራው አሰልጣኝ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Waggaa dorgommii 2023-24 A.L.A. keessatti Jiiroonaa FC gara bakka Liigii Chaampiyoonsii seenaatti kan leenjise leenjisaa Ispeen eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Chilean manager reached the UEFA Champions League semi-finals with Villarreal in 2006 and 2nd in La Liga with Real Madrid in 2010?
prompt_am: በ2006 እ.ኤ.አ ከቪያሪያል ጋር፣ በ2010 እ.ኤ.አ ደግሞ ከሪያል ማድሪድ ጋር ድንቅ ጊዜ ያሳለፈው ቺሊያዊ አሰልጣኝ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 2006 A.L.A. Viyaariyaal waliin, bara 2010 A.L.A. immoo Riyaal Maadiriid waliin yeroo dinqisiisaa kan dabarse leenjisaa Chiilii eenyu?

prompt_en: Which former Real Madrid captain played over 700 matches for the club before finishing his career at Schalke and Al Sadd?
prompt_am: ከ700 በላይ ጨዋታዎችን ለሪያል ማድሪድ ካደረገ በኋላ በሻልካ እና አል ሳድ ተጫውቶ ያጠናቀቀው ታዋቂው ካፕቴን ማን ነው?

prompt_en: Which German manager won 7 Bundesliga titles combined with Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich?

prompt_om: Boruushiyaa Doortimund fi Baayern Muniik waliin walitti qabaadhaan waancaa Buundesliigaa 7 kan injifate Ottmaar Hitzfeld ii?

prompt_en: Who managed Werder Bremen to two Bundesliga titles (1987-88 and 1992-93) before leading Greece to Euro 2004 glory?
prompt_am: ቨርደር ብሬመንን ለሁለት የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎች የመራውና በኋላ ግሪክን በዩሮ 2004 ሻምፒዮን ያደረገው ኦቶ ሬሃገል ነው?
prompt_om: Werder Biireemen gara waancaa Buundesliigaa laniitti leenjisee booda Giriik gara injifannoo Yuuroo 2004tti kan leenjise Ottoo Reehaagal ii?

prompt_en: Which newly promoted club won an astounding Bundesliga title in their very first season in 1997-98 under Otto Rehhagel?
prompt_am: በኦቶ ሬሃገል አሰልጣኝነት በ1997-98 እ.ኤ.አ ወደ ሊጉ ባደገበት የመጀመሪያው ዓመት የቡንደስሊጋ ሻምፒዮን የሆነው ካይሰርስላውተርን ነው?
prompt_om: Leenjisummaa Ottoo Reehaagaaliin bara dorgommii 1997-98 A.L.A. keessatti bara ol-guddate keessatti mo'ataa Buundesliigaa kan ta'e Kaayisersilawutern ii?

prompt_en: Which Swiss forward scored 106 Bundesliga goals for Borussia Dortmund in the 1990s and 2000s?
prompt_am: በ1990ዎቹ እና 2000ዎቹ ለቦሩሲያ ዶርትሙንድ 106 የቡንደስሊጋ ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ስቴፋን ሻፑይሳ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 1990oota fi 2000oota keessatti Boruushiyaa Doortimundiif galchii Buundesliigaa 106 kan galche Sitefaan Shapuyisaa tii?

prompt_en: Which French winger spent 12 seasons at Bayern Munich from 2007 to 2019, winning 9 Bundesliga titles?
prompt_am: ከ2007 እስከ 2019 እ.ኤ.አ ለ12 ዓመታት በባየር ሙኒክ ተጫውቶ 9 የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያነሳው ፍራንክ ሪበሪ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 2007 hanga 2019 A.L.A. waggaa 12f Baayern Muniik keessa taphatuudhaan waancaa Buundesliigaa 9 kan fudhate Firaank Riiberii tii?

prompt_en: Which German attacker dubbed himself a 'Raumdeuter' (Space Interpreter) and won 12 Bundesliga titles with Bayern Munich?
prompt_am: ራሱን 'ራኡምዶይተር' (የቦታ ተርጓሚ) በማለት የሚጠራው እና ከባየር ሙኒክ ጋር 12 የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያነሳው ቶማስ ሙለር ነው?
prompt_om: Ofiin 'Raumdeuter' jedhee kan waame fi Baayern Muniik waliin waancaa Buundesliigaa 12 kan fudhate Toomaas Mulleer ii?

prompt_en: Who scored the winning goal for Germany in the 2014 World Cup final after starring for Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich?
prompt_am: ለቦሩሲያ ዶርትሙንድ እና ባየር ሙኒክ ከተጫወተ በኋላ በ2014 እ.ኤ.አ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍፃሜ ለጀርመን የአሸናፊነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው ማሪዮ ጎትዘ ነው?
prompt_om: Boruushiyaa Doortimund fi Baayern Muniikiif erga taphate booda xumura Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2014 A.L.A. irratti Jarmaniif galchii injifannoo kan galche Maariyoo Goetze tii?

prompt_en: Which Borussia Dortmund captain and local icon played 429 matches for the club from 2012 to 2024?
prompt_am: ከ2012 እስከ 2024 እ.ኤ.አ ለቦሩሲያ ዶርትሙንድ 429 ጨዋታዎችን ያደረገው ታዋቂው ካፕቴን ማርኮ ሮይስ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 2012 hanga 2024 A.L.A. keessatti Boruushiyaa Doortimundiif tapha 429 kan taphate kapteena beekamaan Maarkoo Royis ii?

prompt_en: Which Gabon international striker scored 31 Bundesliga goals for Borussia Dortmund in the 2016-17 season to win the Torjägerkanone?
prompt_am: በ2016-17 እ.ኤ.አ የውድድር ዓመት ለዶርትሙንድ 31 ጎሎችን በማስቆተር የሊጉ ኮከብ አግቢ የሆነው ፒየር-ኤመሪክ ኦባሜያንግ ነው?
prompt_om: Waggaa dorgommii 2016-17 A.L.A. keessatti Doortimundiif galchii 31 galchuudhaan galchii baay'ee Liigii kan galche Piyer-Emeriik Oubaameyaang ii?

prompt_en: Which Japanese playmaker won back-to-back Bundesliga titles with Borussia Dortmund in 2010-11 and 2011-12?
prompt_am: ከቦሩሲያ ዶርትሙንድ ጋር በ2010-11 እና 2011-12 እ.ኤ.አ ተከታታይ የሊግ ዋንጫዎችን ያነሳው ሺንጂ ካጋዋ ነው?
prompt_om: Boruushiyaa Doortimund waliin bara dorgommii 2010-11 fi 2011-12 A.L.A. keessatti walitti aansee waancaa Liigii kan fudhate Shiinjii Kaagaawaa tii?

prompt_en: Which Norwegian prodigy scored 62 Bundesliga goals in 67 games for Borussia Dortmund between January 2020 and May 2022?
prompt_am: ከጥር 2020 እስከ ግንቦት 2022 እ.ኤ.አ ለቦሩሲያ ዶርትሙንድ በ67 ጨዋታዎች 62 ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ኦርሊንግ ሀላንድ ነው?
prompt_om: Amajjii bara 2020 hanga Caamsaa bara 2022 A.L.A. keessatti Boruushiyaa Doortimundiif tapha 67 keessatti galchii 62 kan galche Erliing Haalaand ii?

prompt_en: Which Austrian defender won 10 Bundesliga titles during his stay at Bayern Munich from 2008 to 2021?
prompt_am: በባየር ሙኒክ 13 ዓመታትን አሳልፎ 10 የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያሸነፈው ዳቪድ አላባ ነው?
prompt_om: Baayern Muniik keessatti waggaa 13 dabarsuudhaan waancaa Buundesliigaa 10 kan injifate Daaviid Alaabaa tii?

prompt_en: Who coached Bayern Munich during their historic 2012-13 Treble-winning season?
prompt_am: ባየር ሙኒክን በ2012-13 እ.ኤ.አ ለታሪካዊው የሶስትዮሽ ዋንጫ (Treble) ድል የመራው ዩፕ ሄይንከስ ነው?
prompt_om: Baayern Muniik bara dorgommii 2012-13 A.L.A. keessatti gara waancaa sadii seenaatiitti kan leenjise Yuup Heynkes ii?

prompt_en: Who holds the record for the most total goal assists in Bundesliga history (over 140 assists)?
prompt_am: በቡንደስሊጋ ታሪክ ከ140 በላይ የጎል ኳሶችን በማመቻቸት (assists) ከፍተኛውን ሪከርድ የያዘው ቶማስ ሙለር ነው?
prompt_om: Seenaa Buundesliigaa keessatti kubbaa galchiif mijeessuu 140 ol mijeessuudhaan rekoordii kan qabu Toomaas Mulleer ii?

prompt_en: Which former Bayern Munich and Germany captain won 8 Bundesliga titles and was nicknamed 'Der Titan'?
prompt_am: 8 የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያሸነፈውና 'ደር ቲታን' በሚል ቅጽል ስም የሚታወቀው ኦሊቨር ካን ነው?
prompt_om: Waancaa Buundesliigaa 8 kan injifate fi maqaa masoo 'Der Titan' jedhamuun kan beekamu Oliver Kaan ii?

prompt_en: Which German goalkeeper revolutionized the 'Sweeper-Keeper' role playing for Schalke 04 and Bayern Munich?
prompt_am: ለሻልክ 04 እና ባየር ሙኒክ ተጫውቶ የ'ስዊፐር-ኪፐር' ሚናን ያሻሻለው ማኑኤል ኖየር ነው?
prompt_om: Shaalkee 04 fi Baayern Muniikiif taphatuudhaan shoora 'Sweeper-Keeper' kan haroomse Maanu'eel Nooyer ii?

prompt_en: Who scored 28 goals for VfB Stuttgart in the 2023-24 season to help them finish 2nd ahead of Bayern Munich?
prompt_am: በ2023-24 (በ2016 ዓ.ም) የውድድር ዓመት ለቪኤፍቢ ሽቱትጋርት 28 ጎሎችን በማስቆተር ክለቡ ሁለተኛ ሆኖ እንዲያጠናቅቅ የረዳው ሰርሁ ጊራሲ ነው?
prompt_om: Waggaa dorgommii 2023-24 A.L.A. keessatti VfB Sintuutgaartiif galchii 28 galchuudhaan kilaabichi sadarkaa 2ffaa akka xumuru kan gargaare Serhuu Giiraasii tii?

prompt_en: Which club plays at the Red Bull Arena in Leipzig, entering the Bundesliga for the first time in 2016?
prompt_am: በ2016 እ.ኤ.አ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ወደ ቡንደስሊጋ ያደገው እና በሬድ ቡል አሬና የሚጫወተው አርቢ ไลፕዚግ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 2016 A.L.A. keessatti seenaa isaa keessatti jalqabaaf gara Buundesliigaatti kan ol-guddate fi Red Buul Areenaatti kan taphatu RB Laaypziig ii?

prompt_en: Who is the all-time top goalscorer for RB Leipzig in Bundesliga history with over 90 goals?
prompt_am: በቡንደስሊጋ ታሪክ ለአርቢ ไลፕዚግ ከ90 በላይ ጎሎችን በማስቆተር የምንግዜም ከፍተኛ ጎል አግቢው ቲሞ ቨርነር ነው?
prompt_om: Seenaa Buundesliigaa keessatti RB Laaypziigiif galchii 90 ol galchuun sadarkaa jalqabaa kan qabu Tiimoo Werner ii?

prompt_en: What is the name of the German football ownership rule that ensures club members hold majority voting rights?
prompt_am: የክለቡ አባላት የአብላጫ ድምፅ መብት እንዲኖራቸው የሚያደርገው የጀርመን እግር ኳስ ህግ 'የ50+1 ህግ' (50+1 Rule) ይባላል?
prompt_om: Seera kubbaa miilaa Jarman kan miseensonni kilaabaa sagalee irra-caalmaa akka qabaatan taasisisu 'Seera 50+1' jedhamaa?

prompt_en: Which famous derby match takes place between Hamburger SV and SV Werder Bremen in Northern Germany?
prompt_am: በሰሜን ጀርመን በሀምበርገር ኤስቪ እና ቨርደር ብሬመን መካከል የሚደረገው ታዋቂ ዴርቢ 'ኖርድዴርቢ' (Nordderby) ይባላል?
prompt_om: Kaaba Jarman keessatti Haamburgii SV fi Werder Biireemen giddutti taphi morkii taphatamu 'Nordderby' jedhamaa?

prompt_en: Which rivalry match takes place between 1. FC Köln and Borussia Mönchengladbach in the Rhineland?
prompt_am: በኮሎን እና ቦሩሲያ ሞንሸንግላድባህ መካከል የሚደረገው የራይንላንድ ዴርቢ 'ራይንዴርቢ' (Rheinderby) ይባላል?
prompt_om: 1. FC Koln fi Booruusiyaa Moonshengladbaah giddutti taphi morkii taphatamu 'Rheinderby' jedhamaa?

prompt_en: Who is the all-time leading goalscorer for Werder Bremen in Bundesliga history with 141 goals?
prompt_am: በቡንደስሊጋ ታሪክ ለቨርደር ብሬመን 141 ጎሎችን በማስቆተር የምንግዜም ከፍተኛ ጎል አግቢው ክላውዲዮ ፒዛሮ ነው?
prompt_om: Seenaa Buundesliigaa keessatti Werder Biireemeniif galchii 141 galchuun sadarkaa jalqabaa kan qabu Kiilaawudiiyoo Piizaarroo tii?

prompt_en: Which Brazilian striker scored 28 goals for Werder Bremen in 2003-04 to help them win their 4th Bundesliga title?
prompt_am: በ2003-04 እ.ኤ.አ የውድድር ዓመት ለቨርደር ብሬመን 28 ጎሎችን በማስቆተር ክለቡ ሻምፒዮን እንዲሆን የረዳው አይልተን (Aílton) ነው?
prompt_om: Waggaa dorgommii 2003-04 A.L.A. keessatti Werder Biireemeniif galchii 28 galchuudhaan waancaa 4ffaa akka fudhatu kan gargaare Aa'iilton ii?

prompt_en: Which German midfielder was nicknamed 'Fußballgott' by Bayern Munich supporters?
prompt_am: በባየር ሙኒክ ደጋፊዎች 'ፉስባልጎት' (የእግር ኳስ አምላክ) በሚል ቅጽል ስም የሚታወቀው ባስቲያን ሽዋይንስታይገር ነው?
prompt_om: Deeggartoota Baayern Muniikiitiin maqaa masoo 'Fußballgott' jedhamuun kan beekamu Baastiyaan Shwaayinstaayger ii?

prompt_en: Which German right-back and captain won 8 Bundesliga titles with Bayern Munich before retiring in May 2017?
prompt_am: በግንቦት 2017 እ.ኤ.አ ከእግር ኳስ ከመሰናበቱ በፊት ከባየር ሙኒክ ጋር 8 የቡንደስሊጋ ዋንጫዎችን ያነሳው ፊሊፕ ላም ነው?
prompt_om: Caamsaa bara 2017 A.L.A. keessatti kubbaa miilaa irraa boqochuu isaatiin dura Baayern Muniik waliin waancaa 8 kan fudhate Filiip Laam ii?

prompt_en: Which Dutch striker scored 82 Bundesliga goals for FC Schalke 04 between 2010 and 2017?
prompt_am: ለሻልክ 04 82 የቡንደስሊጋ ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ሆላንዳዊ አጥቂ ክላስ-ያን ሆንቴላር ነው?
prompt_om: Shaalkee 04f galchii Buundesliigaa 82 kan galche taphattaa fuula duraa Neezerlaandii Kilaas-Jaan Huuntelaar ii?

prompt_en: Who scored 170 Bundesliga goals playing for VfB Stuttgart, Bayern Munich, and VfL Wolfsburg?
prompt_am: ለቪኤፍቢ ሽቱትጋርት፣ ባየር ሙኒክ እና ቮልፍስበርግ ተጫውቶ 170 የቡንደስሊጋ ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ማሪዮ ጎሜዝ ነው?
prompt_om: VfB Sintuutgaart, Baayern Muniik, fi Wolfisburgiif taphatuudhaan galchii Buundesliigaa 170 kan galche Maariyoo Goomez ii?

prompt_en: Who holds the record for most World Cup goals in history (16) and scored 121 Bundesliga goals?
prompt_am: በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ 16 ጎሎችን በማስቆተር ከፍተኛው ጎል አግቢ የሆነው እና በቡንደስሊጋ 121 ጎሎችን ያስቆጠረው ሚሮስላቭ ክሎዘ ነው?
prompt_om: Seenaa Waancaa Addunyaa keessatti galchii 16n galchii baay'ee galche kan ta'e fi Buundesliigaa keessatti galchii 121 kan galche Miroslaav Kiloosee tii?

prompt_en: Which left-footed forward scored 55 Bundesliga goals for 1. FC Köln and Bayern Munich, nicknamed 'Poldi'?
prompt_am: 'ፖልዲ' በሚል ቅጽል ስም የሚታወቀው እና ለኮሎንና ባየር ሙኒክ የተጫወተው ሉካስ ፖዶልስኪ ነው?

Only if it touches the post

prompt_en: Which international body is officially responsible for determining the Laws of the Game in football?

prompt_en: In which FIFA World Cup tournament were red and yellow cards officially introduced for the first time?

prompt_en: In what year was the back-pass rule officially introduced to prevent goalkeepers from handling foot passes?

prompt_en: What is the exact distance from the penalty spot to the goal line?

prompt_en: Can an attacking player be called offside if they receive the ball directly from a corner kick?

options_om: Eegduu qalloo bira yoo jiraate qofa
Maii, kornarii irraa ofsaayid hin jiru

prompt_en: Can an attacking player be called offside if they receive the ball directly from a goal kick?

options_om: Eeyyee, eegduu duubaa darbee yoo jiraate
Maii, galchii dhawaa irraa ofsaayid hin jiru

prompt_en: Who was the English referee credited with inventing red and yellow cards after the 1966 World Cup?
prompt_am: በ1966 እ.ኤ.አ ዓለም ዋንጫ ውዝግብ ምክንያት የቀይና ቢጫ ካርድ ሃሳብን ያመጣው እንግሊዛዊ ዳኛ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Waancaa Addunyaa bara 1966 A.L.A. booda yaada kadi diimaa fi keelloo kan uume abbaan seeraa Ingilaand eenyu?

prompt_en: What is the standard width between the inside of the two goalposts in adult professional football?

prompt_om: Kubbaa miilaa piriifeshinaala idilee keessatti utubaa galchii laniin giddutti fageenyi jiru ያርድ (ሜተራ) meeqaq?

prompt_en: What is the official height from the ground to the bottom of the crossbar on a standard goal post?
prompt_am: ከመሬት ተነስቶ እስከ ቋሚው አግድም እንጨት (crossbar) ያለው ይፋዊ ቁመት ስንት ጫማ (ሜትር) ነው?

prompt_en: What is the standard depth of the main penalty box (penalty area) from the goal line into the pitch?

prompt_en: According to IFAB Laws, what is the maximum duration for the half-time break interval?

prompt_om: Akka seera IFABtti boqonnaan walakkaa taphaa (half-time) daangaa yeroo isa olaanaan daqiiqaa meeqaq?

prompt_en: How many total Laws of the Game are outlined in the official IFAB handbook?

prompt_om: Kitaba official IFAB keessatti walumaagalatti seerotni kubbaa miilaa meeqatu tarreeffame?

prompt_en: Which of the following is NOT one of the four reviewable scenarios for VAR (Video Assistant Referee)?
prompt_am: ከሚከተሉት ውስጥ ቪኤአር (VAR) የመመርመር መብት የሌለው የትኛውን ውሳኔ ነው?
prompt_om: Kanreen keessaa VARn (Gargaaraa Abbaa Seeraa Vidiyoo) irra deebiee ilaaluuf mirga kan hin qabne kam?

prompt_en: What type of restart is awarded if a goalkeeper catches a deliberate back-pass kicked by a teammate's foot?
prompt_am: ተጫዋች በእግሩ ሆን ብሎ የመታለትን ኳስ ግብ ጠባቂ በእጁ ቢይዝ ጨዋታው በምን አይነት ምት ይጀመራል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon miila isaatiin ta'e jedhee kubbaa kkenneef eegduun qalloo harkaatiin yoo qabate taphi maaliin jalqaba?

prompt_en: What disciplinary action must a referee take if a player removes their shirt during a goal celebration?
prompt_am: አንድ ተጫዋች ጎል አግብቶ ደስታውን ሲገልጽ ማሊያውን አውልቆ ቢወረውር ዳኛው ምን አይነት እርምጃ መውሰድ አለበት?
prompt_om: Taphattoon galchii erጋ galchee booda gammachuu agarsiisuuf uffata isaa አውልቆ yoo darbe abbaan seeraa tarkaanfii kam fudhachuu qaba?

prompt_en: Can a team score a goal directly into the opposition net from a goal kick?
prompt_am: አንድ ቡድን ከጎል መምቻ (goal kick) በቀጥታ የተቃራኒው መረብ ላይ ጎል ማስቆጠር ይችላል?
prompt_om: Gareen tokko galchii dhawaa (goal kick) irraa kallattiidhaan koochi morkataa keessatti galchii galchuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: Yes, a goal can be scored directly

prompt_en: What is awarded if a player takes a free kick directly into their own team's goal without touching anyone else?
prompt_am: አንድ ተጫዋች ቅጣት ምት መትቶ ማንንም ሳይነካ በቀጥታ በራሱ ግብ ላይ አገባ ቢባል ጨዋታው በምን ይጀመራል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon adabbii libre irraa osoo namni biraa hin tuqin kallattiidhaan galchii ofii keessatti yoo galche taphi maaliin jalqaba?

prompt_en: Can an attacking player be penalized for offside if they are positioned inside their own half of the pitch?
prompt_am: አንድ አጥቂ በራሱ የሜዳ አጋማሽ ውስጥ ቆሞ ከሆነ በኦፍሳይድ ሊቀጣ ይችላል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon haleellaa walakkaa dirree isaa keessatti dhaabbatee yoo jiraate ofsaayidiin adabamuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: No, offside cannot occur in one's own half
options_am: አይ፣ በራስ አጋማሽ ሜዳ ላይ ኦፍሳይድ የለም
options_om: Maii, walakkaa dirree ofii keessatti ofsaayid hin jiru
Walakkaa geengoo bira yoo jiraate qofa

prompt_en: What is the radius of the center circle drawn on a standard football pitch?
prompt_am: በሜዳው ማዕከል ላይ የተሳለው ክበብ (center circle) ራዲየስ ስንት ያርድ (ሜትር) ነው?
prompt_om: Geengoon walakkaa dirree kubbaa miilaa idilee irራ መስመሩ የራዲየስ ያርድ (ሜተራ) meeqaq?

prompt_en: Under current IFAB rules, how many substitutions is a team allowed to make during a standard 90-minute match?
prompt_am: በአሁኑ የአይኤፍኤቢ (IFAB) ህግ መሰረት በመደበኛ 90 ደቂቃ ጨዋታ አንድ ቡድን ስንት ተጫዋች መቀየር ይችላል?
prompt_om: Akka seera IFAB ammayyaatti tapha idilee daqiiqaa 90 keessatti gareen tokko taphattoota meeqaq jijjiiruu danda'a?

prompt_en: In how many separate windows (excluding the half-time break) can a team make their 5 substitutions during a match?
prompt_am: አንድ ቡድን 5 ተጫዋቾችን ለመቀየር (ከዕረፍት ሰዓት ውጭ) በስንት የተለያዩ ዙሮች/እድሎች መጠቀም አለበት?
prompt_om: Gareen tokko jijjiirraa 5 taasiisuuf (boqonnaa walakkaa malee) Carraa marsaa meeqatti fayyadamuu qaba?

prompt_en: When taking a penalty kick, can the kicker play the ball backward to a teammate?
prompt_am: የፔናልቲ ምት በሚመታበት ወቅት መቺው ኳሷን ወደ ኋላ ለቡድን አጋሩ ማለፍ ይችላል?
prompt_om: Yeroo adabbii (penalty) rukutamu, rukuttaan kubbaa gara duubatti taphattaa garee isaatiif dabarsuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: No, the ball must move forward
Yes, if teammate is outside box
options_am: አይ፣ ኳሷ የግድ ወደ ፊት ማንቀሳቀስ አለባት
options_om: Maii, kubbaan gara fuulduraatti socho'uu qaba

prompt_en: Does a goal count if the entire ball has NOT completely crossed the goal line?
prompt_am: ሙሉ በሙሉ የኳሷ አካል የጎል መስመሩን ካላቋረጠ ጎል ይቆጠራል?
prompt_om: Guutummaatti qaamni kubbaa sarara galchii yoo hin qaxxaamurrin galchiin ni lakka'amaa?
options_en: No, the whole ball must completely cross the line
options_am: አይ፣ የኳሱ ሙሉ አካል መስመሩን ማለፍ አለበት
options_om: Maii, guutummaan kubbaa sarara qaxxaamuruu qaba

prompt_en: In what year was the 'Golden Goal' extra-time rule officially abolished by IFAB?
prompt_am: 'ወርቃማ ጎል' (Golden Goal) ህግ በአለም አቀፉ እግር ኳስ ቦርድ በይፋ የተሻረው በየትኛው ዓመት ነው?
prompt_om: Seerri 'Galchii Warqee' (Golden Goal) sirnaan IFABtiin kan diigame bara kam keessatti?

prompt_en: Can a substitute player sitting on the bench receive a direct Red Card from the referee?
prompt_am: በተቀያሪ ወንበር ላይ ያለ ተጫዋች ከዳኛው ቀጥታ ቀይ ካርድ ሊሰጠው ይችላል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon jijjiirraa teessoo irratti taa'u kallattiidhaan kadi diimaa abbaa seeraa irraa fudhachuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: Yes, substitutes can be sent off
options_om: Eeyyee, taphattoon jijjiirraas ari'amuu ni danda'a

prompt_en: Since 2019, can head coaches and team bench officials be shown official yellow and red cards?
prompt_am: ከ2019 እ.ኤ.አ ጀምሮ ዋና አሰልጣኞችና የቴክኒክ አባላት ቢጫ እና ቀይ ካርድ ሊሰጣቸው ይችላል?
prompt_om: Bara 2019 A.L.A. irraa jalqabee leenjistoonni olaanoo fi hoggantoonni kadi keelloo fi diimaa agarsiifamuu ni danda'uu?
options_en: Yes, cards can be shown to team officials
options_om: Eeyyee, kadiin hoggantoota gareetiif agarsiifamuu ni danda'a

prompt_en: What is the minimum official weight required for a size 5 match ball at the start of a game?
prompt_am: በጨዋታ መጀመሪያ ላይ የቁጥር 5 ኳስ አነስተኛው ይፋዊ ክብደት ስንት ግራም መሆን አለበት?
prompt_om: Jalqaba taphaa irratti ulfinni official xiqqaansaa kubbaa lakkoofsa 5 giraama meeqaq ta'uu qaba?

prompt_en: What is the official circumference range for a standard size 5 match football?
prompt_am: የመደበኛ ቁጥር 5 ኳስ ይፋዊ የዙሪያ ርዝመት (circumference) ስንት ሴንቲሜትር ነው?
prompt_om: Kabaja geengoo (circumference) official kubbaa miilaa lakkoofsa 5 seentimeetira meeqaq?

prompt_en: What is the correct restart if the match ball bursts or deflates during active open play?
prompt_am: ጨዋታው እየተካሄደ ሳለ ኳሷ ብትፈነዳ ወይም አየር ብታጣ ጨዋታው በምን ይጀመራል?
prompt_om: Taphi osoo deemaa jiru kubbaan yoo dhooke ykn qilleensa dhabe taphi maaliin jalqaba?

prompt_en: What is the total duration of extra time played when a match is tied after 90 minutes?
prompt_am: ጨዋታው በ90 ደቂቃ አቻ ተጠናቆ ወደ ጭማሪ ሰዓት ሲያልፍ አጠቃላይ የጭማሪ ሰዓቱ ስንት ደቂቃ ነው?
prompt_om: Taphi daqiiqaa 90 keessatti qixxee erga xumuramee booda gara yeroo dabalataatti yoo darbe walumaagalatti yeroon dabalataa daqiiqaa meeqaq?

prompt_en: According to the IFAB rulebook, what is the maximum time a goalkeeper may hold the ball with their hands before releasing it?
prompt_am: በህጉ መሰረት ግብ ጠባቂው ኳሷን በእጁ ይዞ ማቆየት የሚችለው ከፍተኛው ጊዜ ስንት ሰከንድ ነው?
prompt_om: Akka seera IFABtti eegduun qalloo harka isaatiin kubbaa qabachuudhaan tursuu danda'u daangaan yeroo isa olaanaan sekondii meeqaq?

prompt_en: Can an attacking player be called offside directly from a throw-in restart?
prompt_am: አንድ አጥቂ ኳስ በቀጥታ ከእጅ ውርወራ (throw-in) ሲቀበል ኦፍሳይድ ይባላል?
prompt_om: Taphattoonni haleellaa uርወራ harka (throw-in) irraa kallattiidhaan kubbaa yoo fudhatan ofsaayid jedhamuu danda'uu?
options_en: Yes, if inside opposition penalty area
No, offside does not apply from throw-ins
options_am: አዎ፣ በተቃራኒ ፔናልቲ ሳጥን ውስጥ ከሆነ
options_om: Eeyyee, adabbii morkataa keessatti yoo jiraate
Eegduu qalloo bira yoo jiraate qofa
Maii, uርወራ harka irraa ofsaayid hin jiru
Eeyyee, eegduu duubaa darbee yoo jiraate

prompt_en: Which parts of the body are explicitly NOT considered when determining an offside position?
prompt_am: ኦፍሳይድ በሚወሰንበት ወቅት ከግምት ውስጥ የማይገቡት የሰውነት ክፍሎች የትኞቹ ናቸው?
prompt_om: Ofsaayid yeroo murtaa'u qaamota namaa keessaa kanneen ሂሳብ keessa hin galle isaannii kam?

prompt_en: If a penalty taker shoots, the ball hits the post and rebounds back to the taker without anyone else touching it, can the taker score directly?
prompt_am: ፔናልቲ መቺው መትቶ ኳሷ ከቋሚ ተመልሳ ሌላ ተጫዋች ሳይነካት አግኝቶ ቢመታት ጎሉ ይጸድቃል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon adabbii rukute, kubbaan utubaa rukutee osoo namni biraa hin tuqin gara isaatti yoo deebi'e, kallattiidhaan galchuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: No, it is a double-touch infraction
Yes, it is a valid goal
options_am: አይ፣ ድርብ ንክኪ በመሆኑ ጥፋት ነው
options_om: Maii, tuqaa ድርብ waan ta'eef yakka

prompt_en: What is the traditional penalty shootout order where team A and team B alternate 1-by-1 called?
prompt_am: በመለያ ምት ወቅት ቡድን ሀ እና ቡድን ለ እየተካፈሉ ተራ በተራ የሚመቱበት ባህላዊ የፔናልቲ አሰራር ምን ይባላል?
prompt_om: Adabbii xumuraa keessatti gareen A fi gareen B tarradhaan tokko tokkoon rukutan sirni aadaa maali jedhama?

prompt_en: If an outfield player deliberately stops a certain goal on the line using their hand, what is the sanction?
prompt_am: አንድ ተጫዋች (ከግብ ጠባቂ ውጭ) በጎል መስመር ላይ በሚገባ የነበረችውን ኳስ በእጁ ቢመልስ የሚሰጠው ውሳኔ ምንድን ነው?
prompt_om: Taphattoon dirree (eegduu qallootiin ala) sarara irratti galchii mirkanaa'aa harkaatiin yoo dhorge, adabbiin isaa maali?
options_en: Red Card and a Penalty Kick
Red Card and Indirect Free Kick
options_am: ቀይ ካርድ እና የቀጥታ ያልሆነ ቅጣት ምት
options_om: Kadi diimaa fi Adabbii kallattii hin taane

prompt_en: What restart is awarded to the opposing team when an attacking player is caught offside?
prompt_am: አንድ አጥቂ ተጫዋች በኦፍሳይድ ሲያዝ ለተቃራኒ ቡድን የሚሰጠው የጨዋታ ማስጀመሪያ ምት የትኛው ነው?
prompt_om: Taphattoon haleellaa ofsaayidiin yoo qabame garee morkataaf taphi maaliin jalqabama?

prompt_en: How many assistant referees (linesmen) directly assist the main referee along the pitch touchlines?
prompt_am: በሜዳው የጎን መስመሮች ላይ ዋናውን ዳኛ በቀጥታ የሚያግዙት ስንት ረዳት ዳኞች (መስመር ዳኞች) ናቸው?
prompt_om: Sarara cinaa dirree irራ abbaa seeraa olaanaa kallattiidhaan kan gargaaran gargaartonni abbaa seeraa meeqaq?

prompt_en: What card is issued to a player who commits a second yellow card offense in the same match?
prompt_am: በአንድ ጨዋታ ሁለተኛ ቢጫ ካርድ ለተመለከተ ተጫዋች የሚሰጠው ካርድ የትኛው ነው?
prompt_om: Tapha tokko keessatti kadi keelloo 2ffaa kan argate taphattaaf kadii kamtu agarsiifama?

prompt_en: When executing a throw-in, where must both of the thrower's feet be positioned?
prompt_am: የእጅ ውርወራ በሚፈጸምበት ወቅት የውርዋሪው ሁለቱም እግሮች የት መሆን አለባቸው?
prompt_om: Uርወራ harka yeroo raawwatamu, miillan lachuu taphattaa uርዉ position kam irratti dhaabbachuu qabu?
options_en: Lifting off the ground in the air
On or behind the touchline on the ground
Fully inside the field of play
options_am: በመስመሩ ላይ ወይም ከመስመሩ በስተኋላ መሬት ላይ
options_om: Sarara irratti ykn sarara duuba lafa irratti

prompt_en: If an attacking player accidentally handles the ball immediately before scoring a goal, is the goal valid?
prompt_am: አንድ አጥቂ ጎል ከማስቆጠሩ በፊት በስህተት/ሳይታሰብ ኳስ በእጁ ቢነካ ጎሉ ይጸድቃል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon haleellaa galchii galchuu isaatiin dura dogoggoraan harkaatiin kubbaa yoo tuqe galchiin ni lakka'amaa?
options_en: No, handball in goal build-up disallows the goal
options_am: በ6 ያርድ ሳጥን ውስጥ ከሆነ ብቻ
አይ፣ በጎል ሂደት ላይ የእጅ ንክኪ ጎሉን ያሽረዋል
options_om: Eeyyee, ta'e jedhee yoo hin taane
Maii, galchii dura harka tuquun galchicha diiga

prompt_en: How far away must opponents remain from the corner arc during the execution of a corner kick?
prompt_am: የማዕዘን ምት በሚመታበት ወቅት ተቃራኒ ተጫዋቾች ከማዕዘኑ ክበብ ስንት ያርድ (ሜትር) ርቀው መቆም አለባቸው?
prompt_om: Yeroo kornarii dhawamu morkattoonni geengoo kornarii irraa fageenya ያርድ (ሜተራ) meeqaq irratti dhaabbachuu qabu?

prompt_en: How many main referees are on the field directly controlling play during a standard professional match?

prompt_om: Tapha piriifeshinaala idilee keessatti dirree keessa seenee tapha kan dursa ture abbaan seeraa olaanaan meeqaq?

prompt_en: What is the correct match restart if the main referee inadvertently blows the whistle during active open play?
prompt_am: ጨዋታው እየተካሄደ ሳለ ዳኛው በስህተት ፊሺካውን ቢነፋ ጨዋታው በምን ይጀመራል?
prompt_om: Taphi osoo deemaa jiru abbaan seeraa dogoggoraan piftee yoo fiimse taphi maaliin jalqaba?
options_en: Dropped ball to team last in possession
options_am: በመጨረሻ ኳስ ለነበረው ቡድን የመንጠብጠብ ኳስ (Dropped ball)
options_om: Kubbaa gadi dhiifamu garee dhuma qabuuf

prompt_en: Can a player score a goal directly into the opponent's net from the initial kick-off at the start of a half?
prompt_am: አንድ ተጫዋች ጨዋታው ሲጀምር ከማዕከል ኳስ (kick-off) በቀጥታ የተቃራኒው መረብ ላይ ጎል ማስቆተር ይችላል?
prompt_om: Taphattoon jalqaba taphaa irraa geengoo walakkaa (kick-off) irraa kallattiidhaan koochi morkataa keessatti galchii galchuu ni danda'aa?
options_en: No, kick-off must be passed to teammate
Yes, a goal can be scored directly from kick-off
options_am: አይ፣ ኳሷ ለቡድን አጋር መተላለፍ አለባት
አዎ፣ ከማዕከል ኳስ በቀጥታ ጎል ማስቆተር ይቻላል
options_om: Eeyyee, kick-off irraa kallattiidhaan galchuu ni danda'ama

prompt_om: Seenaa Waancaa Addunyaa keessatti (bara 1974 A.L.A. Jarman Dhihaa irratti) kadi diimaa official isa jalqabaa kan argate taphattaa Chiilii eenyu?

prompt_en: Which two nations featured in the very first penalty shootout in FIFA World Cup history (1982 semi-final)?
prompt_am: በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ የመጀመሪያውን የመለያ ምት (በ1982 እ.ኤ.አ ግማሽ ፍፃሜ) ያደረጉት ሁለቱ ሀገራት እነማን ናቸው?
prompt_om: Seenaa Waancaa Addunyaa keessatti adabbii xumuraa isa jalqabaa (garmalee xumuraa bara 1982 A.L.A.) kan taphatan biyyoota laniin eenyu fa'i?

prompt_en: Which country's national league introduced the revolutionary 3-points-for-a-win rule first in 1981?
prompt_am: በ1981 እ.ኤ.አ ለአሸናፊ ቡድን 3 ነጥብ የመስጠት ህግን ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ስራ ላይ ያዋለችው ሀገር የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Bara 1981 A.L.A. keessatti seera mo'ataaf qabxii 3 kennuu jalqabaaf hojiirra kan oolchite biyya kam?

prompt_en: Who scored the first Golden Goal in UEFA European Championship history in the Euro 1996 final?
prompt_am: በዩሮ 1996 እ.ኤ.አ ፍፃሜ በአውሮፓ ሻምፒዮንሺፕ ታሪክ የመጀመሪያውን ወርቃማ ጎል (Golden Goal) ያስቆጠረው ጀርመናዊ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Xumura Yuuroo bara 1996 A.L.A. irratti seenaa Dorgommii Yuurooppii keessatti Galchii Warqee (Golden Goal) isa jalqabaa kan galche taphattaa Jarman eenyu?

prompt_en: Who scored the first Golden Goal in FIFA World Cup history for France against Paraguay in 1998?
prompt_am: በ1998 እ.ኤ.አ የዓለም ዋንጫ በፓራጓይ ላይ በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ የመጀመሪያውን ወርቃማ ጎል ያስቆጠረው ፈረንሳይኛ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Waancaa Addunyaa bara 1998 A.L.A. keessatti Paraguwaay irratti seenaa Waancaa Addunyaa keessatti Galchii Warqee isa jalqabaa kan galche taphattaa Faransaay eenyu?

prompt_en: Which country was the first African nation to qualify for a FIFA World Cup final tournament (1934)?
prompt_am: ለዓለም ዋንጫ ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ ማለፍ የቻለችው የመጀመሪያዋ የአፍሪካ ሀገር (በ1934 እ.ኤ.አ) የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Dorgommii xumura Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA (1934 A.L.A.) keessatti hirmaachuuf biyya Afrikaa isa jalqabaa kan ta'e kam?

prompt_en: Which country was the first African nation to reach the FIFA World Cup quarter-finals (1990)?
prompt_am: በ1990 እ.ኤ.አ የዓለም ዋንጫ ሩብ ፍፃሜ በመድረስ የመጀመሪያዋ የአፍሪካ ሀገር የሆነችው የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 1990 A.L.A. keessatti qarbaa xumuraa gahuudhaan biyya Afrikaa isa jalqabaa kan ta'e kam?

prompt_en: Which country became the first African nation to reach a FIFA World Cup semi-final in 2022?
prompt_am: በ2022 እ.ኤ.አ በካታር ለመጀመሪያ ጊዜ የዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍፃሜ በመድረስ ታሪክ የሰራችው የአፍሪካ ሀገር የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Qataar 2022 A.L.A. keessatti seenaa keessatti jalqabaaf garmalee xumura Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA kan geesse biyya Afrikaa kam?

prompt_en: Which country became the first Asian nation to reach a FIFA World Cup semi-final in 2002?
prompt_am: በ2002 እ.ኤ.አ የዓለም ዋንጫ ግማሽ ፍፃሜ በመድረስ የመጀመሪያዋ የእስያ ሀገር የሆነችው የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA bara 2002 A.L.A. keessatti garmalee xumuraa gahuudhaan biyya Eeshiyaa isa jalqabaa kan ta'e kam?

prompt_en: What is officially considered the oldest professional football ground still in continuous use today (opened 1855)?
prompt_am: ከ1855 እ.ኤ.አ ጀምሮ አሁንም አገልግሎት ላይ የሚገኘው በዓለም አንጋፋው ስታዲየም ብራማል ሌን ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 1855 A.L.A. irraa jalqabee hanga ammaatti tajaajila irra kan jiru Istaadiyeemiin kubbaa miilaa piriifeshinaala angafni Biiraamaal Leen ii?

prompt_en: Which is the oldest national football governing association in the world, founded in October 1863?
prompt_am: በጥቅምት 1863 እ.ኤ.አ የተመሰረተው በዓለም ላይ አንጋፋው የሀገር እግር ኳስ ፌዴሬሽን የትኛው ነው?
prompt_om: Onkololeessa bara 1863 A.L.A. keessatti kan hundaa'e federeeshiniin kubbaa miilaa biyyoolessaa angafni addunyaa irraa kam?

prompt_en: In what year was the first South American Championship (Copa América) held in Argentina?
prompt_am: የመጀመሪያው የደቡብ አሜሪካ ሻምፒዮንሺፕ (ኮፓ አሜሪካ) በአርጀንቲና የተካሄደው በየትኛው ዓመት ነው?

prompt_en: Which nation won the inaugural Copa América tournament in 1916?
prompt_am: በ1916 እ.ኤ.አ የመጀመሪያውን የኮፓ አሜሪካ ውድድር ያሸነፈችው ሀገር የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Bara 1916 A.L.A. dorgommii Koopaa Ameeriikaa isa jalqabaa kan injifatte biyya kam?

prompt_en: In what year was the first UEFA European Championship (Euro) tournament held in France?
prompt_am: የመጀመሪያው የኤውሮጳ ሻምፒዮንሺፕ (ዩሮ) በፈረንሳይ የተካሄደው በየትኛው ዓመት ነው?

prompt_en: Which country won the inaugural European Championship (Euro) in 1960, defeating Yugoslavia 2-1?
prompt_am: በ1960 እ.ኤ.አ የመጀመሪያውን የአውሮፓ ዋንጫ (ዩሮ) ዩጎዝላቪያን 2 ለ 1 በማሸነፍ ያነሳችው ሀገር የትኛዋ ናት?
prompt_om: Bara 1960 A.L.A. Yuugoslaaviyaa 2-1 mo'achuun Shaampiyoonaa Yuurooppii (Yuuroo) isa jalqabaa kan fudhatte biyya kam?

prompt_en: Who was the French football administrator who proposed the creation of the European Championship, after whom the trophy is named?
prompt_am: የአውሮፓ ሻምፒዮንሺፕ እንዲጀመር ሃሳብ ያቀረበውና ጽዋው በስሙ የተሰየመው ፈረንሳይኛ ማን ነው?
prompt_om: Shaampiyoonaan Yuurooppii akka jalqabu yaada kan dhiheesse fi waancaan maqaa isaatiin moggaafame beekamaan Faransaay eenyu?

prompt_en: Which Scottish club became the first British team to win the European Cup in 1967 ('Lisbon Lions')?

prompt_en: Which English club became the first English team to win the European Cup in 1968, beating Benfica 4-1?
prompt_am: በ1968 እ.ኤ.አ ቤንፊካን 4 ለ 1 በማሸነፍ የመጀመሪያው የእንግሊዝ ክለብ ሆኖ የኤውሮጳ ዋንጫ ያነሳው ማንችስተር ዩናይትድ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 1968 A.L.A. Benfiikaa 4-1 mo'achuun kilaaba Ingilaand isa jalqabaa waancaa Yuurooppii fudhate kan ta'e Maanchestar Yunaaytiid ii?

prompt_en: Which French player scored the very first goal in FIFA World Cup history in July 1930 against Mexico?
prompt_am: በሐምሌ 1930 እ.ኤ.አ በሜክሲኮ ላይ በዓለም ዋንጫ ታሪክ የመጀመሪያዋን ጎል ያስቆጠረው ፈረንሳይኛ ሉሲየን ሎሬንት ነው?

prompt_en: Who scored the 1,000th goal in World Cup history for the Netherlands against Scotland in 1978?

prompt_en: Who scored the 2,000th goal in World Cup history for Sweden against Paraguay in 2006?

prompt_om: Seenaa Waancaa Addunyaa keessatti bara 2006 A.L.A. galchii 2,000ffaa Siwiidiiniif kan galche Maarkus Allbaack ii?

prompt_en: Which Spanish club won the first five editions of the European Cup consecutively from 1956 to 1960?
prompt_am: ከ1956 እስከ 1960 እ.ኤ.አ የመጀመሪያዎቹን አምስት የኤውሮጳ ዋንጫዎች ተከታታይ ያሸነፈው ሪያል ማድሪድ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 1956 hanga 1960 A.L.A. walitti aansee waancaa Yuurooppii jalqabaa shanantaan kan injifate Riyaal Maadiriid ii?

prompt_en: In what year was Goal-line Technology officially implemented at a FIFA World Cup for the first time in Brazil?

prompt_om: Teeknoolojiin Sarara Galchii Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA irratti jalqabaaf Biraazilitti bara kam keessatti tajaajila irra oole?

prompt_en: Which European club won the first-ever FIFA Club World Cup held in Brazil in January 2000 / Corinthians won?

prompt_en: Which country won the very first Asian Cup tournament held in Hong Kong in 1956?

prompt_om: Bara 1956 A.L.A. Hoong Koongitti Waancaa Eeshiyaa isa jalqabaa kan injifatte Kooriyaa Kibbaa tii?

prompt_en: Who scored four goals for Real Madrid against Eintracht Frankfurt in their 7-3 European Cup final win in 1960?

prompt_om: Xumura waancaa Yuurooppii bara 1960 A.L.A. irratti Riyaal Maadiriid 7-3 yeroo mo'atu galchii 4 kan galche Feerenk Puskaas ii?

prompt_en: Who scored a hat-trick for Real Madrid in that same 7-3 European Cup final win over Eintracht Frankfurt in 1960?

prompt_om: Xumura waancaa Yuurooppii 7-3 bara 1960 A.L.A. sana keessatti Riyaal Maadiriidiif haat-triikii kan galche Alfireedoo Di Isitefaanoo tii?

prompt_en: Which country won the very first FIFA World Cup held in Montevideo in 1930?

prompt_om: Bara 1930 A.L.A. Moonteeviideeyootti Waancaa Addunyaa FIFA isa jalqabaa kan injifatte Urugwaay ii?

prompt_en: Who scored the winning goal for Spain against Netherlands in the 2010 FIFA World Cup final in Johannesburg?
prompt_am: በ2010 እ.ኤ.አ የዓለም ዋንጫ ፍፃሜ በኔዘርላንድስ ላይ ለስፔን በጭማሪ ሰዓት የአሸናፊነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው አንድሬስ ኢኒየስታ ነው?
prompt_om: Xumura Waancaa Addunyaa bara 2010 A.L.A. Jahaanesburgitti held ta'e irratti Neezerlaandii irratti Ispeeniif galchii injifannoo kan galche Andires Iniyestaa tii?

prompt_en: Which English club won back-to-back European Cups in 1979 and 1980 under manager Brian Clough?
prompt_am: በ1979 እና በ1980 እ.ኤ.አ በአሰልጣኝ ብራያን ክላፍ መሪነት ተከታታይ የኤውሮጳ ዋንጫዎችን ያሸነፈው ኖቲንግሃም ፎረስት ነው?
prompt_om: Leenjisaa Biraayan Kilaaf jalatti bara 1979 fi 1980 A.L.A. walitti aansee waancaa Yuurooppii kan injifate Notinghaam Forest ii?

prompt_en: Which German club won three consecutive European Cups from 1974 to 1976?
prompt_am: ከ1974 እስከ 1976 እ.ኤ.አ ሶስት ተከታታይ የኤውሮጳ ዋንጫዎችን ያሸነፈው ባየር ሙኒክ ነው?
prompt_om: Bara 1974 hanga 1976 A.L.A. walitti aansee waancaa Yuurooppii sadii kan injifate Baayern Muniik ii?

prompt_en: Which Dutch club won three consecutive European Cups from 1971 to 1973 starring Johan Cruyff?
prompt_am: ከ1971 እስከ 1973 እ.ኤ.አ ሶስት ተከታታይ የኤውሮጳ ዋንጫዎችን ያሸነፈው አያክስ ነው?

prompt_en: Which country won back-to-back European Championships in 2008 and 2012 alongside their 2010 World Cup win?
prompt_am: በ2008 እና 2012 እ.ኤ.አ ተከታታይ የዩሮ ዋንጫዎችን እንዲሁም የ2010 ዓለም ዋንጫን ያሸነፈችው ስፔን ናት?
prompt_om: Bara 2008 fi 2012 A.L.A. walitti aansee waancaa Yuuroo fi Waancaa Addunyaa 2010 kan injifatte Ispeen ii?

prompt_en: Who scored the extra-time winning goal for Portugal against France in the Euro 2016 final (1-0 win)?
prompt_am: በዩሮ 2016 እ.ኤ.አ ፍፃሜ በጭማሪ ሰዓት በፈረንሳይ ላይ ለፖርቱጋል የአሸናፊነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው ኤደር ነው?
prompt_om: Xumura Yuuroo 2016 A.L.A. irratti yeroo dabalataa keessatti Faransaay irratti Poortugaaliif galchii injifannoo kan galche Eder ii?

prompt_en: Which country won Euro 2020 (played in 2021) by defeating England on penalties at Wembley Stadium?
prompt_am: በ2020 እ.ኤ.አ (በ2021 በተካሄደው) በዌምብሊ እንግሊዝን بالمለያ ምት አሸንፋ የዩሮ ዋንጫ ያነሳችው ጣሊያን ናት?
prompt_om: Yuuroo 2020 (kan 2021 taphatame) Wembiliitti adabbii irratti Ingilaand mo'achuun waancaa kan fudhatte Itaalii tii?

prompt_en: Which country won a record 4th European Championship title in Euro 2024 by defeating England 2-1 in Berlin?
prompt_am: በ2024 እ.ኤ.አ በበርሊን እንግሊዝን 2 ለ 1 በማሸነፍ ለ4ኛ ጊዜ የአውሮፓ ሻምፒዮን የሆነችው ስፔን ናት?
prompt_om: Yuuroo 2024 A.L.A. Berliinitti Ingilaand 2-1 mo'achuun waancaa Yuurooppii 4ffaa rekoordii kan fudhatte Ispeen ii?

prompt_en: Who scored the 86th-minute winning goal for Spain against England in the Euro 2024 final?
prompt_am: በ2024 እ.ኤ.አ የዩሮ ፍፃሜ በ86ኛው ደቂቃ በእንግሊዝ ላይ ለስፔን የአሸናፊነት ጎል ያስቆጠረው ሚኬል ኦያርዛባል ነው?
prompt_om: Xumura Yuuroo 2024 A.L.A. irratti daqiiqaa 86ffaa irratti Ingilaand irratti Ispeeniif galchii injifannoo kan galche Miikeel Oyaarzaabaal ii?
